What We Build

Our Services

From ground-up builds to backyard transformations, every project gets the same standard: careful planning, clear communication, and craftsmanship built to last.

Residential Construction

Home additions, remodels, and improvements — built with permits handled, schedules kept, and details done right.

Commercial Construction

Build-outs and tenant improvements delivered on schedule, with the coordination your business depends on.

Outdoor Living Spaces

Pergolas, patios, decks, summer kitchens, and pool surrounds — outdoor spaces made for the South Florida lifestyle.

Construction Management & Consulting

Professional oversight, planning, and coordination that keeps your project on budget and on track.

Who We Are

Built On More Than Workmanship

Epoch Contracting was founded by construction professionals who believe successful projects are built on more than quality workmanship — they're built on trust, communication, and accountability.

With years of experience managing construction projects throughout South Florida, we bring a strong foundation of planning, organization, and professionalism to every job. As a licensed and insured general contractor, we take a hands-on approach to every project — whether it's a home improvement, outdoor living space, renovation, or commercial build-out.

Our goal is simple: deliver high-quality work, keep our clients informed every step of the way, and create results that stand the test of time.

  • Licensed General Contractor leadership on every project
  • Personalized service from company owners — not salespeople
  • Strong communication and transparency throughout construction
  • Reliable scheduling and project coordination
  • Commitment to quality workmanship and long-term client relationships
